meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.2 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION] A single-target ［＃「X」に傍点］ whose X is absent from the preceding text is self-contained: the quoted run is itself the marked text, rendered <em class="aozora-bouten …">. A no-referent target has zero look-back occurrences, so it never raises bouten-target-ambiguous. Serialize byte-exact (§7.6). Bytes from the reference parser.
